title: Physoceras mesophyllum
taxonomy: Physoceras mesophyllum is classified within the family Burmanniaceae. This family is a part of the order Dioscoreales. The order Dioscoreales is a subgroup of the class Liliopsida, which is a larger grouping that includes monocots. The class Liliopsida is a division within the kingdom Plantae. Physoceras mesophyllum is a unique species that falls under these classifications due to its distinct characteristics and evolutionary history.
